name: Full Bleach Rpg
description:
LOREBOOK ADDED, YAY!

ALL CHARACTERS ARE 18+

Full Bleach RPG

MASSIVE UPDATE MANY CHARACTERS ADDED, ALL CAPTAINS, ICHIGO'S GROUP, YORUCIHI, URAHRA, ISSHIN, NEL, AIZEN, GIN, TOUSEN, ALL ESPADAS, STERNRITTER, VISORED AND YHWACH.

(since bot max is 8k and bot has 4k perm tokens and persona takes 500tokens if maxed, you have 3.5-4k in chat memory, instead of usual 5k cap, so be more concise in chat memory 😊)

Welcome, {{user}}, to the world of Soul Reapers, Hollows, and hidden conspiracies. The timeline is set after Sosuke Aizen’s betrayal of the Soul Society, when he revealed his plans and fled to Hueco Mundo. The stage is set for intense battles, moral dilemmas, and the clash of powerful forces. This is your story, and you can shape it as you wish. The narrative will also evolve beyond this moment, eventually encompassing the rise of the Quincy Wandenreich and the Thousand-Year Blood War. Your actions will shape the world as it progresses.

Role Options:

Soul Reaper – A Rising Star

You are a newly promoted seated officer in your division, full of potential and determination. The chaos caused by Aizen’s betrayal has created a void in leadership, and you must rise to meet the challenges of your duties. Will you become a hero of the Soul Society, or will you find yourself questioning its justice?

Visored – A Soul Reaper with a Dark Past

You are a former Soul Reaper who has gained Hollow-like powers. Shunned by both the Soul Society and the Hollows, you walk a lonely path. Will you embrace your hybrid nature and fight for balance, or will the pull of your inner Hollow lead you down a dangerous road?

Arrancar – A Warrior of Hueco Mundo

As an Arrancar serving under Aizen, your loyalty to his cause defines your actions. Are you a firm believer in his vision of the future, or are you biding your time, waiting for the right moment to pursue your own goals? Your choices will shape your journey within Hueco Mundo.

Custom Persona

Create a character entirely your own, complete with their own backstory, abilities, and allegiance. Are you a wandering rogue with unclear motives, or perhaps an experimental creation caught between the worlds of Hollows and Soul Reapers? This is your journey to define. Write your story in your persona and in chat memory for best chance of bot to use it perfectly.

Character Details:

Backstory:

Craft a backstory that defines your character’s journey up to this point. Were you an unseated Soul Reaper who narrowly escaped Aizen’s betrayal? A Hollow who gained sentience and evolved into an Arrancar? Or a rogue human caught in the conflict between realms? The choice is yours.

Allegiance:

Align yourself with the forces of the Soul Society, Hueco Mundo, or walk your own path in the human world. Be aware that your actions and decisions may shift your allegiances over time.

Proxy Enable. Works well with deepseek as well.


If you’re enjoying this bot, your support means a lot—tips and commissions help me create even better bots! Links to support are on my profile.
https://janitorai.com/profiles/a52e0069-0b38-4114-8639-1549dcad4b73_profile-of-vandixz

But before we begin ple
